name: chat-workspace
title: Chat Workspace
description: Chat Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/chat-workspace",
  "workspace": "chat",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "agent-panel",
    "chat-app",
    "chat-home-page",
    "chat-chat-detail-page",
    "chat-database-page",
    "chat-extensions-detail-detail-page",
    "chat-extensions-detail-page",
    "chat-extensions-index-page",
    "chat-extensions-page",
    "chat-observability-page",
    "chat-settings-page",
    "chat-team-page",
    "chat-home-block",
    "chat-chat-detail-block",
    "chat-database-block",
    "chat-extensions-detail-detail-block",
    "chat-extensions-detail-block",
    "chat-extensions-index-block",
    "chat-extensions-block",
    "chat-observability-block",
    "chat-settings-block",
    "chat-team-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "chat-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "agent-panel",
      "chat-app",
      "chat-home-page",
      "chat-chat-detail-page",
      "chat-database-page",
      "chat-extensions-detail-detail-page",
      "chat-extensions-detail-page",
      "chat-extensions-index-page",
      "chat-extensions-page",
      "chat-observability-page",
      "chat-settings-page",
      "chat-team-page",
      "chat-home-block",
      "chat-chat-detail-block",
      "chat-database-block",
      "chat-extensions-detail-detail-block",
      "chat-extensions-detail-block",
      "chat-extensions-index-block",
      "chat-extensions-block",
      "chat-observability-block",
      "chat-settings-block",
      "chat-team-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "chat",
    "chat",
    "database",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "observability",
    "settings",
    "team"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Chat",
    "summary": "Chat Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.chat.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/chat"
        },
        {
          "label": "Chat Detail",
          "route": "/chat/chat/:threadId"
        },
        {
          "label": "Database",
          "route": "/chat/database"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/chat/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/chat/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/chat/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions",
          "route": "/chat/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Observability",
          "route": "/chat/observability"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/chat",
        "page": "page.chat.home",
        "title": "Chat Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/chat/:threadId",
        "page": "page.chat.chat-detail",
        "title": "Chat Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.chat-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/chat.$threadId.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/database",
        "page": "page.chat.database",
        "title": "Database",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.database"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/database.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.chat.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.chat.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.extensions-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/extensions",
        "page": "page.chat.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.extensions-index"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/extensions",
        "page": "page.chat.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.extensions"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/observability",
        "page": "page.chat.observability",
        "title": "Observability",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.observability"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/observability.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/settings",
        "page": "page.chat.settings",
        "title": "Settings",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.settings"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/settings.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/chat/team",
        "page": "page.chat.team",
        "title": "Team",
        "blocks": [
          "block.chat.team"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/team.tsx"
      }
    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.chat.home",
        "title": "Chat Home",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route / derived from _index.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.chat-detail",
        "title": "Chat Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /chat/:threadId derived from chat.$threadId.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/chat.$threadId.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.database",

        "components": [

      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /extensions/:id/:slug derived from extensions.$id.$slug.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /extensions/:id derived from extensions.$id.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /extensions derived from extensions._index.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /extensions derived from extensions.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.observability",
        "title": "Observability",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /observability derived from observability.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/observability.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.settings",
        "title": "Settings",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /settings derived from settings.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/settings.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.chat.team",
        "title": "Team",
        "description": "Agent-Native chat route /team derived from team.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "agent-panel",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/team.tsx"
      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.chat.home",
        "title": "Home",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.chat-detail",
        "title": "Chat Detail",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/chat.$threadId.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.database",

        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",

          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/database.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/extensions.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.observability",
        "title": "Observability",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/observability.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.settings",
        "title": "Settings",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/settings.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.chat.team",
        "title": "Team",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/chat/app/routes/team.tsx"
      }
    ],
    "componentParts": [
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "panel"
    ],
    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "Chat keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.",
      "empty": "No records are loaded for Chat in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.",
      "error": "Chat agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path."
    },
    "agentNativeTemplate": {
      "sourceRepo": "https://github.com/yrka-io/agent-native.git",
      "upstreamRepo": "https://github.com/BuilderIO/agent-native.git",
      "sourcePath": "agent-native/templates/chat",
      "copiedSource": false,
      "license": "ISC",
      "importedAs": "jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure",
      "sourceDirectories": [
        "actions",
        "app",
        "server",
        "data",
        "public"
      ]
    },
    "provenance": {
      "source": "registry/workspaces/chat/workspace-shell.json",
      "copiedSource": false
    }
  },
  "implementation": {
    "status": "mounted-react-workspace-implementation",
    "runtimeReactApp": true,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "source": "packages/ui/src/workspaces.mjs",
    "app": "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/chat-app.implementation.json",
    "pages": [
      "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/pages/chat-home-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/pages/chat-chat-detail-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/pages/chat-database-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/pages/chat-extensions-detail-detail-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/pages/chat-extensions-detail-page.page.implementation.json",

      "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/pages/chat-team-page.page.implementation.json"
    ],
    "blocks": [
      "studio-ui/workspaces/chat/blocks/chat-home-block.block.implementation.json",

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Chat template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
